note: As-built. flow = the shipped read+display path: contract.Feature.WaitingForInput() read by three read-only display sites (renderCard ⏸ cue via cardBadgeText+badgeStyleFor, gogo status waitMarker WAIT column, viewBoard interleaveSeparators │ column borders). control-surface = the board move-guard (move.go attemptAction) routing each card class/status to a delegated launch (launch.ActionAccept/-Go/-Done), the new ActionAccept filling the plan-acceptance gap; the CLI never mutates state. activity = the pipeline status lifecycle with the three ⏸USER gates WaitingForInput() flags vs the auto transitions (incl. /gogo:done's Slice-A prompt-free mechanical steps). sequence = the shipped board-accept interaction end to end: m → BuildIntent(ActionAccept) → confirm → launch → /gogo:accept session → gogo-plan single-owner recording → state flip. Slice A (skill-bash safety, guarded scoped-find rewrites + the TestSkillsBashNoUnsafeRm lint) is textual, no structural diagram.
